name: ext4

metadata.name: ext4
metadata.summary: Library for read only interactions with an ext4 filesystem

documentation:
[![ext4 on PyPI](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/ext4)](https://pypi.org/project/ext4)

# Ext4
Library for read only interactions with an ext4 filesystem.

```python
from ext4 import Volume

# Extract raw ext4 image
with open("image.ext4", "rb") as f:
    # Extract specific file
    volume = Volume(image, offset=0)
    inode = volume.inode_at("/etc/version")
    with open("version", "wb") as f:
        f.write(inode.open().read())
```

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_REV.EXT4_DYNAMIC_REV
documentation: V2 format w/ dynamic inode sizes

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_MOUNT.USRQUOTA
documentation: "old" user quota, enable enforcement for hidden quota files

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_MOUNT.GRPQUOTA
documentation: "old" group quota, enable enforcement for hidden quota files

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_MOUNT.DIOREAD_NOLOCK
documentation: Enable support for dio read nolocking

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_MOUNT2.STD_GROUP_SIZE
documentation: We have standard group size of blocksize * 8 blocks

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_FL.APPEND
documentation: writes to file may only append

class_variables.name: ext4.enum.EXT4_FL.NOTAIL
documentation: file tail should not be merged
